pairs.question: Who was the manager of VfL Wolfsburg at the start of the 2025–26 Bundesliga season?
pairs.answer: The manager at the start of the season was Paul Simonis.

pairs.question: How many points did Wolfsburg earn under interim manager Daniel Bauer before his permanent appointment?
pairs.answer: Daniel Bauer earned seven points from four Bundesliga matches before being given the permanent role.

pairs.question: What was Wolfsburg's final position in the 2025–26 Bundesliga before the relegation play-off?
pairs.answer: Wolfsburg finished in 17th place, placing them in the relegation play-off.

pairs.question: Describe the sequence of managerial changes at VfL Wolfsburg during the 2025–26 season.
pairs.answer: The club started the season under Paul Simonis, who was dismissed after 10 matches. He was replaced by Daniel Bauer on an interim basis, then permanently on 20 December. Bauer was sacked on 8 March after poor results, and Dieter Hecking took over, leading the team to avoid automatic relegation before losing in the relegation play-off.

pairs.question: Did VfL Wolfsburg qualify for the DFB-Pokal second round in the 2025–26 season? If so, how?
pairs.answer: Yes, Wolfsburg qualified for the second round of the DFB-Pokal by defeating SV Hemelingen 9–0 in the first round.

pairs.question: What was the outcome of Wolfsburg's relegation play-off against SC Paderborn?
pairs.answer: Wolfsburg drew 0–0 in the first leg at home but lost 2–1 after extra time in the second leg, resulting in relegation to the 2. Bundesliga.

pairs.question: How long had Wolfsburg been in the Bundesliga before their relegation in 2025–26?
pairs.answer: The 2025–26 season marked Wolfsburg's 29th consecutive season in the Bundesliga, dating back to 1997.
